name: x_thread_embed
description: Tokenize an X thread: fetch conversation, BLAKE3 fingerprints per tweet, optional xAI embeddings + Grok coherence scores. Links to invariant_proof_hash for SpiralSafe audit chain. Requires X_BEARER_TOKEN; XAI_API_KEY optional.

tweetId.description: Root or any tweet id in the thread

includeCoherence.description: Run grok_check_coherence per tweet (slower, needs XAI_API_KEY)
